name: Vulhub-PHP-Inclusion-LFI
isolation_note: Vulhub php/inclusion (LFI, php 7.1.3 apache), bound to 127.0.0.1:8085 only. Owned, disposable local lab.
rationale: PHP local file inclusion (?file=). FILE-READ-ONLY box (no command execution) — so the full goal (cmd-exec + file-read) is NOT reachable; it is a valid data point for the per-step-progress + file-read MILESTONE metrics (7-dim suite), demonstrating the metrics work where binary success cannot. Param name to be empirically confirmed.
